  2 lines, 39 bytes

  39 bytes
[Error] g3rs-hooks/dispatcher-pattern .githooks/pre-commit monolithic hook mode
  No modular `pre-commit.d` directory exists, so no dispatcher is required.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/gitleaks-step-present .githooks/pre-commit gitleaks step missing
  Hook does not execute gitleaks.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-scope-not-hardcoded-literal .githooks/pre-commit verifier scope not hardcoded
  .githooks/pre-commit does not invoke the Rust verifier with a hardcoded unit path.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-no-env-override .githooks/pre-commit no env-override routing
  .githooks/pre-commit does not use environment-override routing.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-no-upward-walk-from-units .githooks/pre-commit no ancestor expansion of discovered units
  .githooks/pre-commit does not call the Rust verifier on ancestor adopted units.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/routing-discovers-marker-pair .githooks/pre-commit no Rust marker pair discovery present
  .githooks/pre-commit does not discover Rust adopted units via the marker pair (`Cargo.toml` + `guardrail3-rs.toml`).
[Error] g3rs-hooks/routing-staged-files-diff-filter-acm .githooks/pre-commit staged-file collection missing --diff-filter=ACM
  `.githooks/pre-commit` does not read staged files with `git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM`.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/calls-validate-repo .githooks/pre-commit hook does not call g3rs validate-repo
  .githooks/pre-commit must invoke `g3rs validate-repo` to enforce repo-level invariants (hook shape, tool presence, repo-wide topology, marker-pair completeness).
[Error] g3rs-hooks/dispatches-per-unit-validate-staged .githooks/pre-commit hook does not dispatch per-unit g3rs validate --staged
  .githooks/pre-commit must invoke `g3rs validate --path <unit> --staged` from a discovery loop over staged files.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/dedups-owning-units .githooks/pre-commit hook does not dedup owning units
  .githooks/pre-commit must dedup discovered owning Rust units (e.g. `sort -u`, `uniq`, or equivalent) before invoking `g3rs validate`.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/skips-when-no-owning-unit .githooks/pre-commit hook does not skip when no owning unit
  .githooks/pre-commit must silently skip Rust-relevant staged files that have no owning adopted unit (lenient policy).
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/no-toolchain-invocation .githooks/pre-commit hook does not invoke cargo directly
  .githooks/pre-commit does not invoke cargo directly.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/contract-trigger-coverage .githooks/pre-commit hook does not declare a RUST_RELEVANT_PATTERN
  `.githooks/pre-commit` must declare a `RUST_RELEVANT_PATTERN='(...)'` regex used by the Rust discovery loop. Without it, contract trigger coverage cannot be proven.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/shell-error-handling .githooks/pre-commit missing fail-closed shell options in `.githooks/pre-commit`
  Add `set -euo pipefail` near the top of `.githooks/pre-commit`, before any real checks run. Without `-e`, a failing command can be ignored and the hook can continue past a broken check.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/valid-shebang .githooks/pre-commit valid hook shebang present
  Hook script starts with a supported shell shebang.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/no-unconditional-exit-zero .githooks/pre-commit no unconditional `exit 0` bypass in `.githooks/pre-commit`
  `.githooks/pre-commit` does not contain an unconditional early `exit 0` path.
[Info] g3rs-hooks/no-bypass-instructions .githooks/pre-commit no hook bypass instructions
  Hook comments do not teach `--no-verify` bypasses.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/merge-conflict-step-present .githooks/pre-commit missing merge-conflict marker scan in `.githooks/pre-commit`
  Add an executable `rg` or `grep` check for `<<<<<<<`, `=======`, and `>>>>>>>` near the start of `.githooks/pre-commit`, before expensive validation. This fails fast on unresolved merge conflicts.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/file-size-step-present .githooks/pre-commit file-size check step missing
  Hook does not execute a concrete file-size guardrail.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/concrete-lockfile-command .githooks/pre-commit missing concrete lockfile integrity command in `.githooks/pre-commit`
  Add an executable Cargo lockfile verification step such as `cargo metadata --locked` to `.githooks/pre-commit`, or delegate to `g3rs validate --path <unit> --staged`. Mentioning lockfiles in text or grepping filenames does not prove the lockfile still resolves.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/required-contract-command-present .githooks/pre-commit hook contract command is missing
  `.githooks/pre-commit` does not execute a command satisfying `cargo fmt --check`. Owner families: fmt. Family hook contracts require this command; comments, echo text, and docs do not count.
